title: kayea macrophylla
intro: Kayea macrophylla, also known as Kayea, is a medicinal plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic properties, which are attributed to the presence of several bioactive compounds such as limonoids. The health benefits of Kayea macrophylla include relief from pain, reduction of fever, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Kayea macrophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a safe and effective manner.
